narrative:
Circleville 4-A (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,027 registered voters, with 66.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
